results.title: Goodbye, ‘Jackass.’ You Were Always the Best at Making Bodily Harm Hilarious
results.description: Part greatest-hits compilation and part fresh kicks to the nuts, 'Jackass: Best and Last' is a well-deserved victory lap for Johnny Knoxville and pals

results.title: Why Lagaan, Rang De Basanti, Taare Zameen Par, 3 Idiots, and Dangal STILL hit hard
results.description: Across 25 years and five landmark films, Aamir Khan didn't just act, He told stories that refused to age. Here's why they still matter.

results.title: Michigan City organist to perform patriotic recital at St. Paul Lutheran Church
results.description: The Roosevelt Organ Concert Series continues with a free performance by organist Anthony Holt in downtown Michigan City.
